---
title: "Literature"
description: "Key readings from the Zotero group Automated Text Recognition, searchable and organized by year."
toc: false
---

This bibliography is drawn from the public Zotero group [**Automated Text Recognition**](https://www.zotero.org/groups/4971878/automated_text_recognition) (group ID: 4971878). Items are loaded live from the Zotero API and grouped by year.

```{=html}
<input
  id="zotero-search"
  type="search"
  placeholder="Search titles, authors, or publications…"
  aria-label="Search bibliography"
/>

<div id="zotero-loading">Loading bibliography…</div>
<div id="zotero-list"></div>

<script>
const ZOTERO_GROUP = "4971878";
const API_BASE = "https://api.zotero.org/groups/" + ZOTERO_GROUP;

function formatAuthors(creators) {
  if (!creators || creators.length === 0) return "";
  const names = creators
    .filter(c => c.creatorType === "author" || c.creatorType === "editor")
    .map(c => {
      if (c.name) return c.name;
      const parts = [];
      if (c.lastName) parts.push(c.lastName);
      if (c.firstName) parts.push(c.firstName.charAt(0) + ".");
      return parts.join(", ");
    });
  if (names.length === 0) return "";
  if (names.length <= 3) return names.join("; ");
  return names.slice(0, 3).join("; ") + " et al.";
}

function formatYear(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return "n.d.";
  const m = dateStr.match(/\b(\d{4})\b/);
  return m ? m[1] : "n.d.";
}

function getVenue(item) {
  return item.publicationTitle ||
    item.bookTitle ||
    item.proceedingsTitle ||
    item.journalAbbreviation ||
    item.publisher ||
    "";
}

function renderItem(item) {
  const d = item.data;
  const authors = formatAuthors(d.creators);
  const year = formatYear(d.date);
  const venue = getVenue(d);
  const doi = d.DOI ? `https://doi.org/${d.DOI}` : d.url || null;
  const title = d.title || "(no title)";

  return `
    <li class="zotero-item">
      <p class="zotero-title">${doi
        ? `<a href="${doi}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${title}</a>`
        : title
      }</p>
      <p class="zotero-meta">
        ${authors ? authors + ". " : ""}${year}${venue ? ". <em>" + venue + "</em>" : ""}${d.DOI ? ". DOI: " + d.DOI : ""}
      </p>
    </li>`;
}

function groupByYear(items) {
  const groups = {};
  items.forEach(item => {
    const y = formatYear(item.data.date);
    if (!groups[y]) groups[y] = [];
    groups[y].push(item);
  });
  return groups;
}

function renderList(items) {
  const container = document.getElementById("zotero-list");
  if (items.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = "<p>No items match your search.</p>";
    return;
  }
  const groups = groupByYear(items);
  const years = Object.keys(groups).sort((a, b) => {
    if (a === "n.d.") return 1;
    if (b === "n.d.") return -1;
    return parseInt(b) - parseInt(a);
  });

  container.innerHTML = years.map(y => `
    <div class="zotero-year-group">
      <h3>${y}</h3>
      <ul id="zotero-list" style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0">
        ${groups[y].map(renderItem).join("")}
      </ul>
    </div>
  `).join("");
}

async function fetchAll() {
  const loading = document.getElementById("zotero-loading");
  let allItems = [];
  let start = 0;
  const limit = 100;

  try {
    while (true) {
      const url = `${API_BASE}/items?format=json&limit=${limit}&start=${start}&sort=date&direction=desc&v=3&itemType=-attachment`;
      const res = await fetch(url);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + res.status);
      const items = await res.json();
      if (items.length === 0) break;
      allItems = allItems.concat(items.filter(i => i.data.title));
      if (items.length < limit) break;
      start += limit;
    }

    loading.style.display = "none";
    window._zoteroAll = allItems;
    renderList(allItems);
  } catch (err) {
    loading.innerHTML = `<p>Could not load bibliography. <a href="https://www.zotero.org/groups/4971878/automated_text_recognition" target="_blank">View directly on Zotero →</a></p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
}

document.getElementById("zotero-search").addEventListener("input", function () {
  const q = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
  if (!window._zoteroAll) return;
  if (!q) {
    renderList(window._zoteroAll);
    return;
  }
  const filtered = window._zoteroAll.filter(item => {
    const d = item.data;
    const haystack = [
      d.title || "",
      formatAuthors(d.creators),
      getVenue(d),
      formatYear(d.date)
    ].join(" ").toLowerCase();
    return haystack.includes(q);
  });
  renderList(filtered);
});

fetchAll();
</script>
```

---

Browse the full group directly at [zotero.org/groups/4971878/automated_text_recognition](https://www.zotero.org/groups/4971878/automated_text_recognition).
